# OnlyNative UI

> Material Design 3 component library for React Native

OnlyNative UI (`@onlynative`) is a React Native component library implementing Material Design 3. It provides a theme system and pre-built UI components with MD3 tokens for colors, typography, shape, spacing, elevation, motion, and state layers.

## Packages

- `@onlynative/core`: Theme provider, light/dark themes, useTheme hook, responsive breakpoint hooks
- `@onlynative/components`: UI components (Button, IconButton, AppBar, Card, Chip, Checkbox, Radio, Switch, TextField, Typography, Layout, List)

## Quick start

Install:
```bash
pnpm add @onlynative/core @onlynative/components @expo/vector-icons react-native-safe-area-context
```

Wrap root with provider:
```tsx
import { MaterialProvider } from '@onlynative/core'

export default function App() {
  return (
    <MaterialProvider>
      {/* Your app */}
    </MaterialProvider>
  )
}
```

Import components via subpath exports (preferred for tree-shaking):
```tsx
import { Button } from '@onlynative/components/button'
import { Card } from '@onlynative/components/card'
```

Or from root:
```tsx
import { Button, Card } from '@onlynative/components'
```

## Requirements

- React Native 0.81+, React 19+, Expo SDK 54+
- Peer deps: `@expo/vector-icons >=15`, `react-native-safe-area-context >=5`

## Docs

- Full docs: https://onlynative.github.io/ui/
- Installation: https://onlynative.github.io/ui/installation
- Theming: https://onlynative.github.io/ui/theming
- Components: https://onlynative.github.io/ui/components/button

## Full API reference

- [llms-full.txt](https://onlynative.github.io/ui/llms-full.txt): Complete API reference with all component props, types, and usage examples in a single file optimized for LLM consumption.
